title: Kryeit: Extra Enhanced
description: Truly enhanced version of the Kryeit Modpack for Season 3, featuring the essential performance enhancing mods whilst also adding shader support with the Create Mod.
body:
# Kryeit: Extra Enhanced

![Showcase image of shaders and extended render distance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a1f29b0c975af8de13c36e0ecc2c2ac0512fa03_0.webp)

### Description
Enhanced Version of the original [Kryeit Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kryeit). This improves upon this modpack by adding only the nessesary performance enhancing mods, to best ensure performance on the server. This modpack is regularly kept up to date.

### Features
- This modpack has all the needed mods for the Kryeit Server
- This modpack contains performance mods such as Sodium and Indium
- This modpack is compatible with __Create and Shaders, providing high fps.__
- This modpack is pre-configured with shaders for optimal performance.

### Experiencing issues?
- Please report crashes in the Kryeit Discord Server, and ping @JustRay

### Copyright Disclaimer
- You are free to use this modpack as a base for your own, but do provide credit.
  
Permission Granted by MuriPlz, author of Kryeit Modpack.
